SSC-CGL-MASTER.name: SSC CGL Master Series
SSC-CGL-MASTER.description: Complete test series for SSC CGL Tier-I and Tier-II covering all subjects: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, and English Comprehension. Includes full-length mocks, sectional tests, and previous year questions.
SSC-CGL-MASTER.syllabus: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, English Comprehension, Computer Proficiency, Data Entry / Typing
